Expression: assume peak occurs in AM for outbound and PM for inbound
assume midday occurs entirely in the midday period
assume peak outbound transit occurs in AM

Description: o-d out of vehicle transit time
Expression: skim_od[('WTW_FWT', 'AM')] + skim_od[('WTW_XWT', 'AM')] + reindex(df.walk_dist_local_bus, df.orig) + skim_od[('WTW_AUX', 'AM')] + reindex(df.walk_dist_local_bus, df.dest)
assume peak inbound transit occurs in PM

Description: o-d out of vehicle transit time
Expression: skim_do[('WTW_FWT', 'PM')] + skim_do[('WTW_XWT', 'PM')] + reindex(df.walk_dist_local_bus, df.orig) + skim_do[('WTW_AUX', 'PM')] + reindex(df.walk_dist_local_bus, df.dest)
assume off-peak inbound and outbound transit occurs in the MD time period
